line_1: Tho' round each stone the sluggard ivy crawls,
line_2: Yet ancient state sits hov'ring on the walls.

line_1: O'er tottering domes in filmy foliage crawls,
line_2: Or frosts with branching plumes the mouldering walls.

line_1: Round her reft castles the pale ivy crawls,
line_2: And sunk and silent are her bannered halls!
